--- a/inspect_render.py

@@ -19,17 +19,29 @@
 model.to(device)

 model.eval()

 

-print('=== render signature ===')

-print(inspect.signature(model.render))

-print('\n=== render source ===')

-print(inspect.getsource(model.render))

-print('\n=== renderer.render source ===')

+print('\n=== Full signature of model.render ===')

+sig = inspect.signature(model.render)

+print(sig)

+print('\nParameters:')

+for name, param in sig.parameters.items():

+    default = param.default if param.default != inspect.Parameter.empty else 'NO_DEFAULT'

+    print(f'  {name}: {default}')

+

+print('\n=== Full source of model.render ===')

 try:

-    print(inspect.getsource(model.renderer.render))

+    print(inspect.getsource(model.render))

 except Exception as e:

-    print('Cannot get renderer.render source:', str(e))

-print('\n=== renderer attributes ===')

-print([attr for attr in dir(model.renderer) if not attr.startswith('_')])

+    print('getsource failed:', str(e))

+

+print('\n=== Renderer forward signature ===')

+try:

+    print(inspect.signature(model.renderer.forward))

+except Exception as e:

+    print('renderer.forward sig failed:', str(e))

+

+print('\n=== Renderer attributes with camera/pose/az ===')

+attrs = [attr for attr in dir(model.renderer) if not attr.startswith('_')]

+print([a for a in attrs if any(k in a.lower() for k in ['camera', 'pose', 'az', 'elev', 'orbit', 'ray'])])

 

 data_path = Path('/data/val')

 obj_dir = next(d for d in data_path.iterdir() if d.is_dir() and (d / 'input.png').exists())

     scene_codes = model([pil_image], device=device)

-    frames = model.render(

+input_cam = cameras[0]

+target_cam = cameras[1]

+rel_az = (target_cam['azimuth'] - input_cam['azimuth']) % 360

+print('\nComputed relative azimuth:', rel_az)

 

-print('Inspection complete.')
+print('\n=== Testing various azimuth control parameters ===')

+test_configs = [

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'azimuth': rel_az, 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'azimuth_deg': rel_az, 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'azimuths': [rel_az], 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevations': [target_cam['elevation']], 'camera_distances': [target_cam['distance']], 'azimuths': [rel_az], 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'azimuth': rel_az, 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'start_azimuth': rel_az, 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'initial_azimuth': rel_az, 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'orbit_azimuth': rel_az, 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 1, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'camera_azimuths': [rel_az], 'return_type': 'pil'},

+    {'n_views': 11, 'elevation_deg': target_cam['elevation'], 'camera_distance': target_cam['distance'], 'return_type': 'pil'},  # baseline

+]

+

+for i, cfg in enumerate(test_configs):

+    try:

+        frames = model.render(scene_codes, **cfg)

+        print(f'SUCCESS with config {i}: {list(cfg.keys())}')

+        print('  Frame type:', type(frames), 'len:', len(frames) if isinstance(frames, (list,tuple)) else 'N/A')

+        if frames and isinstance(frames[0], (list, tuple)):

+            print('  Nested batch structure detected')

+        break

+    except Exception as e:

+        err_type = type(e).__name__

+        if 'unexpected keyword' in str(e):

+            print(f'Config {i} rejected: {err_type} for {list(cfg.keys())}')

+        else:

+            print(f'Config {i} other error with {list(cfg.keys())}: {err_type} - {str(e)[:80]}')

+

+print('\nInspection complete.')
